# XCUIScreenshotProviding

**Protocol**

A type that can provide a screenshot of its current UI state.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor protocol XCUIScreenshotProviding : NSObjectProtocol
```

## Overview

Call this protocol’s [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreenshotProviding/screenshot()] method on an [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIScreen] or [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElement] to capture a screenshot of its current UI state.

## Taking a Screenshot

- **screenshot()**: Takes a screenshot of a screen or UI element’s current visual state.

## Screenshots

- **XCUIScreen**: A physical screen attached to a device.
- **XCUIScreenshot**: A captured image of a screen, app, or UI element state.

## Inherits From

- NSObjectProtocol

## Conforming Types

- XCUIApplication
- XCUIElement
- XCUIScreen
